source_pr.title: executor: fix the unstable test TestDML
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #xxx <!-- REMOVE this line if no issue to close -->

Problem Summary: executor: fix the unstable test TestDML

### What is changed and how it works?

TestDML does some DML operations randomly on partition tables. 
Since these partition tables have PKs, errors may occur when some duplicated rows are inserted into them.
These PKs would not affect the test, so I remove them to make this test stable.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test 

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- executor: fix the unstable test TestDML
